original_prompt: 1. move the main branch of vlucaswang.com to a new git repo for rendercv, push to github. 2. keep src/rendercv_output/Lucas_Wang_CV.pdf as my resume in the website. 3. read and create recent projects for https://github.com/vlucaswang/openclaw-gemini-proxy and https://github.com/vlucaswang/fastly-demo. generate summary and remove the default projects in the site. 4. rewrite the About Me part form the my resume src/rendercv_output/Lucas_Wang_CV.md
